title: Amabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa
s1_body: Mu gufungura konti cyangwa gukoresha pTrack, wemera Amabwiriza y'Ikoreshwa. Niba utemera, ugomba guhagarika gukoresha porogaramu vuba.
s2_body: Ugomba kuba ufite nibura imyaka 16 kugira ngo ukoreshe pTrack. Mu kwiyandikisha, werekana ko uhuza iyi mpamvu.
s3_li1: Gutanga gusa raporo z'imyanda z'ukuri hamwe n'aho zimenyekanisha neza kuri GPS.
s3_li2: Kohereza gusa amafoto wafashe ubwawe cyangwa ufite uburenganzira bwo gusangira.
s3_li3: Kudatanga raporo z'ikinyoma, zitari zo, cyangwa zizungurira.
s3_li4: Kutagerageza gufata amanota binyuze mu bikorwa by'imodoka cyangwa ibinyoma.
s3_footer: Guta amategeko bishobora gutera gusubizwa amanota, guhagarikwa kw'konti, cyangwa guhanwa burundu ku bushake bwacu.
s4_body_pre: Uri inshingano yo kubungabunga ibanga ry'ijambo ryawe ry'ibanga no gusubika ibikorwa byose bigirwa munsi y'konti yawe. Tumenye vuba kuri
s4_body_post: niba usuzuma ko winjijwe nta mvano.
s5_body1: Ugumana ubusambanyi bw'inyandiko (amafoto, ibisobanuro) utanze. Mu gutanga, uha pTrack uruhushya rudasanzwe, rudafite igiciro, rwo kubika no kwereka inyandiko zawe mu ntego z'ingaruka z'umuryango.
s5_body2: Ntutange inyandiko zihuta, zitukana, cyangwa zica uburenganzira bw'abandi. Dufite uburenganzira bwo gukuraho inyandiko iyo ari yo yose ku bushake bwacu.
s6_body1: Amanota nta gaciro k'amafaranga. Dufite uburenganzira bwo guhindura, gusubiza, cyangwa gusubizaho amanota igihe icyo ari cyo cyose, harimo ibikorwa by'ikinyoma cyangwa amakosa y'uburyo.
s6_body2: Ibiranga kubona ibihembo bizaza (niba bizayinjizwa) bizateganywaho amabwiriza y'inyongera azapublikishwa icyo gihe.
s7_body: pTrack itanzwe 'nkuko iri.' Ntitwunga ko izakomeza kuboneka burigihe. Dushobora guhindura, guhagarika, cyangwa guhagarika ibiranga igihe icyo ari cyo cyose. Impinduka z'ingenzi ku mabwiriza azamenyeshwa binyuze mu kibari cy'ubutumwa cya porogaramu iminsi 14 mbere.
s8_body: Mu rugero runaniwe n'amategeko, pTrack n'abafatanyabikorwa bayo ntibasabwa inzigo iyo ari yo yose zitunganye, zagiranye ubwoba, cyangwa z'ingaruka zivuka mu gukoresha urubuga, harimo gutakaza amakuru cyangwa guhagarika serivisi.
s9_body: Amabwiriza aya yayoborwa n'amategeko y'Repubulika y'u Rwanda. Ikibazo cyose kizakemurwa mu nkiko za Kigali, Rwanda.
s10_body: Niba ufite ibibazo bijyanye n'aya Mabwiriza, tuandikire kuri
